description: Full autonomous execution log — self-compounding loop powered by real Aave v3 yield

autonomousLoop.description: TreasuryAgent polls Aave aToken balance every 30s. When yield >= $0.08: withdraw → pay Coordinator via x402 → Coordinator deposits back to Aave → loop continues indefinitely.

phases.label: Bootstrap
phases.description: Seed Aave vault with $2 USDC — faucet.mint() → ERC20.approve() → Pool.supply()

steps.note: Faucet timelock active — used existing wallet balance

phases.label: Human Queries
phases.description: 3 human-paid queries via x402 — each earns $0.08 USDC deposited in full to Aave v3
phases.note: x402 Circle USDC payments confirmed. Aave test USDC deposits for queries 2-3 failed due to faucet timelock leaving insufficient Aave test USDC in wallet. x402 uses Circle USDC (0x036C...), Aave uses its own test USDC (0xba50...) — separate tokens on testnet.

phases.label: Yield Observation
phases.description: Read real aToken balance on-chain — shows principal + accrued interest
phases.note: Yield accrues continuously via Aave liquidity index. Small principal on testnet yields fractions of cents per day — production would use larger principal.

phases.label: Autonomous Query Loop
phases.description: TreasuryAgent monitors aToken balance every 30s. Fires autonomous query when yield >= $0.08 with no human involvement.
phases.productionBehavior: With $100 principal at ~3-5% APY: ~$0.01/day yield → fires autonomous query every ~8 days. Self-funding loop runs indefinitely.

toolsUsed.note: Called by TreasuryAgent when yield threshold met
x402 payment settlement via local facilitator
Polled every 30s by TreasuryAgent to detect yield accumulation
Used by TreasuryAgent to autonomously pay Coordinator from yield

autonomySignals: TreasuryAgent runs on setInterval(30s) — no human trigger needed
Yield detection via real on-chain aToken.balanceOf() — no mock or simulated balance
Pool.withdraw() triggered autonomously when threshold met
wrapFetchWithPayment pays Coordinator without human approval
Coordinator deposits earned USDC back to Aave autonomously after each query
Loop is self-sustaining: principal grows each cycle → more yield → more autonomous queries
safetyMechanisms: monitorActive flag prevents concurrent autonomous queries
txQueue serializes all wallet transactions — prevents nonce conflicts
Withdraw only fires when yield >= QUERY_COST (never touches principal)
validAfter delay in Facilitator prevents EIP-3009 authorization window errors
